review: ordered two heaters both were defective i ordered one of these heaters it was broken when i received it i could see and hear a screw inside of the heater loose when i turned it on the fan did not work the heating element stopped working after being plugged in for just a few minutes and then it started smoking it didnt even turn on after that i requested a replacement heater which came a few days later the replacement heater had the same exact issues a screw was loose inside of the heater where i cannot reach it the heating element only worked for a few minutes before shutting off and the fan did not turn on additionally the second heater also started smoking as soon as the heating element turned on i will never buy this product again and you shouldnt either it is clearly very cheap craftsmanship i will be using a different brand forever and all eternity

damaged item loose rattly bits inside potentially dangerous return or exchange the heater i received is damaged or defective there is a loose small piece ratting around inside the heater which sounds to be a loose screw or broken small loose piece inside also the rectangular heating element inside is wobbly not firmly fastened or fixed in place this cant be right it makes this heater potentially dangerous to operate it could short circuit come further apart internally or jam i would not trust it not to burn down my house except for this damage or defect it appears it would be acceptableregrettably i must request return or replacement

replacement for damaged one is also damaged so these heaters are pretty good but the packaging andor quality control is terrible the first one arrived completely broken as the fan was broken off inside so we asked for a refund and got another one we just received the second one to replace the damaged one and it too is damaged but not enough to affect the function of the heater the screen on the front is dented which makes it look like garbage but at least it works the boxes that both heaters came in were not damaged in shipping at all we arent bothering to return this one because it does work but we dont have time to go through the process of returning it

great for drywall not for studs this is a nice product for ceiling or drywall installation where you can predrill but the placement of the screw holes means that if youre going straight into a stud or beam i installed them directly into a beam on my outdoor pergola you wont have the ability to position a drill or even some types of screwdriver level with the hole im pretty frustrated by this even though i predrilled guide holes the screws went in crooked and ill probably have to wind up reinstalling it altogether its a shame because a fully enclosed curtain rod is a must for outdoor use with the wind we get around here
great product great product for our outside curtains easy to use

do not purchase pilled within a month do not purchase i spent 53 on king size navy sheets for my bed and was happy at first they werent the softest jersey knit sheets ive had but they got better after the first wash however after just a month of use they are already pilled those little balls in the fabric and they now feel rough against my legs i sleep in cotton shorts not flannel pants or sweats so its not like there was any rough fabric rubbing against them to cause the pilling even so it should not have happened so quickly of course i just tried to initiate a return to amazon so i could get my money back and my return window closed a few days ago please do not make the mistake i did the photos are very close up so you can see the little balls of fabric that is all pilled up making the bottom sheet so uncomfortable and scratchy already ugh

ok quality but nothing special ive used these for about 3 years now in comparison to a set of jersey cotton sheets that are at least 30 years old these have not held up in the last three years the way that the other set has in 30 the fitted sheet has pilled quite badly although ive found that the bottom of the fabric doesnt pill in the same way so if you dont mind the seams sticking out by the pillows where the comforter wouldnt cover they can still be soft i have the heather grey color and the color has held up well and i there are no thin spots or holes over all they are comfy and are similar quality to other brands of jersey sheets i have bought at higher price points from other stores perfectly serviceable but nothing special

cooling sheets i had read that these sheets are highly rated as cooling sheets and we got hit with some very hot nights so i decided to give them a try the blush color is nice i would not say they are soft in the typical sense they are smooth and even a bit slippery the fitted sheet is really big i do need deep pockets but these are extra i have some strap things to hold them in place the top sheet is not proportionate to the fitted i feel like i slept cooler than in previous years they are a good value

sleeping better surprisingly comfortable when i first put them on the bed i thought they looked a little thin but they feel great when im sleeping on them its one of those qualityoflife things that i shouldnt have put off you spend a lot of hours sleeping so you shouldnt skimp the combination of softness and just the right amount of stretch makes them feel great even my pillow feels so much more comfortable with the new pillowcase on it my old sheets would loosen from the corners leaving a saggy mess in the middle of the bed forcing me to refit them every day these have stayed tight for many days the corner pockets go way around and under the mattress so i dont expect them to need adjusting between washes i had forgotten that sheets could make such a difference in sleeping comfort im very satisfied and surprised given they are amazon basic

nice sheets for the price cool to the touch i ordered these sheets when i moved into a new house and realized id forgotten to purchase a new set of sheets for my new differently sized bed they were cheap and i figured i would just replace them later on well i was pleasantly surprised these have a nice texture and feel more expensive than they are they do a great job staying cool ive only washed them a couple times so far but theyve held up fine im keeping them as my primary sheets and will be ordering a couple extra pairs as backups highly recommend if youre looking for decent quality sheets without breaking the bank

works but will leak if solution is left in it my child loves bubbles like crazily loves bubbles this definitely produces super easy to use just pour in the included solution into the mouth and press the horn and bubbles kid loves the unicorn now for the problems there is no speed control so its just all out bubble making which is fine if outdoors but indoors it can make the floor slick very quickly next do not leave the solution in the unit as it will leak all over the place overall the device works but the leaking is leaving me no choice but to knock a couple stars off this product

pros and cons the media could not be loaded pros 1cute colorful unicorn design2blows many bubbles3 simple to operatecons 1 bubbles are small2 bubbles catch and gather on top lip and have to be cleared off frequently3 does not hold many bubbles4 most bubbles end up on ground within a few feetsee the video for typical results we had more fun by picking up the unicorn and slightly tilting it backward to direct bubbles away from the ground this would have been much more fun to play with if the bubbles were directed more upward and didnt keep getting stuck in the top lip

cute unicorn fills the air with bubbles my daughter is charmed by this bubble machine she likes that she can feed the unicorn the bubble solution by pouring it into its mouth and in return the unicorn will blow bubbles for her when she pushes on the horn its a cute design and very child friendlyif you put the bubble machine on the ground the bubbles wont go very far so this has to be on an elevated surface like a chair or a table i recommend keeping it close to the edge because in our experience the unicorn slowly builds up front in its mouth and after ten minutes or so will start spitting all over the surface in front of it if used for long periods of time it can get messythe battery life isnt great four aas give the bubble machine enough power to make it through a toddlers birthday party but by the end of the following afternoon we had to replace them

works great and easy to fill and use my daughters really liked this bubble machine they love unicorns and they love bubbles so its a great combination they really like that they can turn it on easily and even fill the reservoir themselves the bubbles just pour into the unicorns mouth so its simple enough for a kid to fillthey were a little disappointed that it only blows regular bubbles they were expecting the little hearts and stars to blow different shaped bubbles the did enjoy playing with this though and thats all that really mattersi would agree that its a bit overpriced compared to others but i guess it depends on how long it lasts since the cheaper ones dont seem to last more than a few weeks

cute but expensive my 4yearold and 7yearold have had an absolute blast playing with this product its small but it really puts out a decent amount of bubbles as much as we love it the price is still a little much for a bubble blower that only comes with a single bottle of bubbles its a cute toy but its nothing that you couldnt pick up a similar item for cheaper at a big box store weve had a blast with it camping but it goes through batteries pretty quickly when you have children who want to play with it constantly

magical bubble blower this unicorn bubble blower has quickly become one of the best things ive ever gotten for my kidsthe unicorn design is super cute and my daughters adore it it blows a lot of bubbles and quickly which makes my life easier when my kids want bubbles i dont have to sit around blowing bubbles from a bubble wand for hours i just fill the unicorn with some bubble solution and turn it on my girls get entertained with bubbles while i can do other things honestly thats the best partim very happy with this bubble machine it would make a great gift for any kid who is obsessed with bubbles

great bubble machine this bubble machine requires 4 aa batteries not included and you will also need to provide your own screwdriver to open the battery compartment it does come with a small bottle of bubble solution after you insert the batteries set this on a flat surface pour some bubble solution into the open mouth of the unicorn as my preschooler said give it a drink and push the horn to turn it on it works great and makes a lot of bubbles its also bigger than i had expected the only negative for me is that you have to keep it on a really flat surface and not bump it since you just pour the solution into the mouth still for the price this is a fun backyard toy

material twists after washing mass produced clothing makers try to get as many pieces of fabric covered with a pattern as they can this causes problems for those who buy the finished product if a pattern piece doesnt get cut parallel to the fabric edges vertically or horizontally the fabric might stretch diagonally after washing causing the seam to twist each time the garment gets washed it twists more tshirts pant legs etc do this too these underwear were not cut correctly so far four of these underwear are twisting it is not comfortable wasted money bought these on april 30 2021

glad i got on sale this is a pretty set but mine did arrive with a tiny bit of tarnish in a corner of one of the bangles im a perfectionist so i literally inspect things from top to bottom in different lighting etc so its 100 possible that im the only one who would even notice plus my bad for not returning it theyre just so prettynow having said that i just looked at the rose gold swarovski and im like damn i would return this and buy that one twice the price i bought this for but i havent given up on this yet prob because i got such a great deal it was like a flash sale and was looking so forward to owning jewelry not under 10

ak watch beautiful watch but the rose gold tone is a little too loud for my taste for everyday wear i wish the gold tone was a little more muted i like the bangle with the swarovski crystalsvery elegant and a nice contrast to the chain the set or any single bangle will be fantastic for special occasions i have a very petite wrist and most of the bangles fitted just rightonly the watch is slightly bigger this may be a problem for average sized wrists good value for under 95 with tax and the watch was ticking when it arrivednot good for the battery lifei have decided to return it as i dont see many occasions to wear thistoo delicate for my everyday bus ride to work

warranty is useless the watch rated at 200 m took on moisture after 2 months with only a few swims no dives to make a claim on the warranty requires a fee of 26 so theyll make money on every warranty claim dont get one of these wetprevious review37mm quartz model i didnt like the nonscrew crown the bracelet requires a jeweler to adjust unless you have the right tools skills and patience no instructions for diy the bezel wont rotate without some kind of tool it is easy to read but not in the dark they recommend servicing the watch every year but a few years service will cost as much as the watch you get what you pay for for 50 bucks the value is okay

old stock or just really cheap band i purchased this watch roughly 3mos ago within first two weeks only worn couple times the gold plating rubbed off in one pic you can see i have over 200 invicta watches and have never had this issue i let seller and mfg know within first 30 days and received zero response or resolution all i asked for was a replacement band or even links to replace so one star for faulty product and for lack of communication sorry but you get what you givedont buy anything gold plated invicta and get it at a dealer where you can resolve an issue

received used watch i purchased the watch for my child for the holidays who didnt want a kids watch rather a more grownup watch like dad the smaller case diameter was a great size the quality for the price was fair and the quartz movement was optimal so he need not worry about setting the time if not used after a couple of days however upon unwrapping the box and opening the case the watch was clearly usedand not slightly used the watch was already ticking battery guard removed the crystal glass was foggy or dirty the case bracelet and clasp all with a significant amount of desk diving type wear i promptly returned and we ordered a new watch elsewhere so hes still waiting for his gift watch was promptly returned and refunded so didnt lose out on anything if you receive a new watch its probably exactly what youre looking for based on the price
not water resistant after three months of normal usemoisture got into it

not automatic as advertised the watch quality is about what i expected which is not bad and it looks great but my young watchenthusiast son for whom this was a gift was a bit disappointed that it has a quartz movement and is not as advertised automatic yes the fine print and details mention batteryquartz but the listing describes it as automatic and it appears in the list of invicta true automatics when one searches amazonplease change the misleading advertisinglisting or please deliver automatic watches when automatic watches are ordered

great upgrade from the invicta pro diver if you dont wear daily you have to reset it daily i have the pro diver version of this which is a little smaller lighter and runs on a battery i found this on my recent carnival cruise and they wanted 210 for it which i knew was insanely high i found this and ordered it here and was the exact same watch love the heavier weight larger profile and the mechanical aspect which does not require a battery anymorethe main downside to this which is annoying comes from the mechanical portion since it does not require a battery it does require constant motion to keep time so if you dont wear this every day it will stop so you send time resetting the date and time every time you want to wear it there is no battery that the motion is recharging as i first thought
very small face on it watch face so small its almost for women

its great but looks great and its comfortable the second hand lines up almost perfectly which i can always appreciate and the magnifier is better than i thought the bracelet however is rately so if you prefer a quieter watch maybe go with another option the pins were also incredibly difficult to remove for resizing broke all my resizing tools even went to a jewelry store and their tool broke too had to go to a watch repair kiosk in the mall to get it fixed so maybe keep that in mind before trying to resize it yourself otherwise its a good bang for buck

two irritating things that caused a return one is that the crown is not a screw down on a diverated watch so youre on a wreck dive and the crown hooks on something and you instantly have a micro fishbowl on you wrist the other really annoying thing is that the bezel is nigh impossible to turn on land too slippery the little scallops are nicely polished to a mirror finish get your hands wet say on a dive and theres no turning this bezel period because of those two things this is a nice solid deskdiver but i wouldnt go near the water with this and i dive my watches

excellent watch for the price i had been reluctant to buy an invicta watch because of the negative reviews but at a great price break on prime day i decided to go for the yellow dial grand diver so far i have been mostly impressed here are the pros and cons i have seenprospriceexcellent stylinglarge but not too large dialquality constructionseiko automatic movementconsvery heavy especially with the original braceletrotating bezel is smooth and extremely difficult to turnlume is weak and not long lastingnot a fan of the invicta name engraved on the outer case

stunning and beautiful i love this grand divers watch with its incredibly accurate automatic seiko nh35a movement i absolutely love this invicta grand diver watch model number 3047i am new to the invicta enthusiast movement this past christmas i received my first invicta big faced watch from my son it was a stainless steel watch with blue and black face and bezel model number 20478 i loved having a big faced watch at that point and within the past 2 months i have purchased 3 more invicta big faced watches and love each one i now have a total of 4 invicta watches and i will most likely be buying more they are just such beautiful machines that i love wearingthis stainless steel automatic grand diver model 3047 with its green bezel and black face is so stunning the contrasting colors make reading the time on this watch a breeze it is not cluttered with intrusive designs or dials and it is not too big at 47mm with that being said it is much larger than any timex or casio or seiko that i have ever owned yet i have 2 more invictas that are actually larger at 50mm this model 3047 has a 47mm case so it is a little bit smaller than my othersthe magnifier on on the dial window is an addition that is much appreciated as you get olderthe dial window is made of a durable mineral crystalthe hands and time indicator marks have a luminescence that actually does glow in the dark unlike many other watches that ive ownedthe band bracelet was very easily sized with very inexpensive tools that you can obtain over the internet sites i resized my watch band myself and i am not a jeweler or watch repair person it came out perfect with no struggle at allthe green color is not loud vivid or trendy it is quite classy and adds just a splash of color to subdue any boringness that become the norm with the runofthemill ordinary silver add black watch that everyone hasthe stainless steel watch case is has a partial satin finish and a partial polished mirror finish the case has the really cool divers helmet molded into the stainless steel case at both the top and bottom this signifies that it really is a genuine divers watch and is capable of withstanding dive depths of approximately 1000 feet although most of us will never dive to those depths and the rest of us will never dive at all the dive depth rating signifies the durability of this watch and we all want a product that is as durable and tough as possiblethis watches bracelet is another work of art the center links have a mirror polished finish and the outer links have a satin finish very classy and contrasty i love it the green bezel actually does rotate in one direction only this is to monitor air supply for the real divers that use this watch for its actual intended purpose there are videos and instructions all over the internet that explain how to use a watch bezel very easymy very favorite feature of this watch is that it incorporates the very reliable and very accurate japanese made automatic seiko movement the seiko movement model number is nh35a yes this watch has the beautiful styling of invicta and it also has the reliable seiko movementin case you didnt know an automatic movement never needs a battery replacement because it does not operate on battery power the motion and movement of your wrist is what winds this accurate watch up you can also wind the watch by hand by turning the crown so i guess you can consider it a hybrid im not sure but that makes sense to mespeaking of the incredible seiko automatic movement the watch manufacturer did not want to hide this special feature from you or your admirers so engineered into the back of the watch is an exhibition back which actually has a window on the back of the case to view the decorated yellow pendulum swinging back and forth to wind your watch again no boringness here lots to look at and admire about your new watchanother very nice feature of this beautiful watch is that it has a screw down crown this is one of the reasons it is rated to dive so deep because screwing down the crown stem actually seals things up more effectively than pressing it inwith this watch you can actually stop the second hand so that you can adjust the time to the exact secondthis grand divers watch with its black face and green bezel is not heavy at all in fact it wears so much more comfortably than any of my lightweight and small timex watches yes it is much larger and much heavier than your normal sized watch but the way the case and high quality bracelet was engineered makes for a very comfortable fit and the weight and size is actually unnoticablei am not a large man my wrist diameter is 7 inches to 7 and a half inches so i have attached pictures of this watch and what it looks like on my 7 to 75 inch wrist in my opinion it fits and looks perfectly the style these days is the big faced watch so this size is very attractivewear this beautiful watch with a pair of jeans or wear it with a black suit to a business meeting or a wedding this is a stunning piece of jewelryhopefully i have addressed all of your concerns or questions that you may have had in case i may have missed something i have added a few pictures to my review so that you can see exactly what the product i have received is like without viewing some modified or professionally photoshopped images that make the product appear like more than what you will receive these attached pictures are raw out of my pointandshoot camera with no editing at all so enjoy can you please do me a favor if you have simply enjoyed reading my review or if my attached pictures and description has helped you in any way could you please mark my review as helpful please i would really appreciate that and it helps encourage me to keep writing reviews of my purchases thanks

failed in nine months i loved this watch when i started using it and function well and it looked and felt great when i was wearing it the indiglo feature was great as i am a frequent backpacker and i could easily read the time in the middle of the night without disturbing any tent matesafter three months however the indiglo failed to work the button would not depressat six months it became difficult to set the time the connection between the time setting knob and the watch movement began to slip periodically sometimes it would grab and sometimes it would just spinthen at nine months the setting knob came off i was able to screw it back in but it no longer worked the action is stuck showing the wrong timeduring the first three months i thought i had a watch to last my lifetime unfortunately it did not even make it to our one year anniversary

its loud and uncomfortable i thought this would make for a decent beater watch but it drives me nuts and i cant wear it for multiple reasons first off it tick so loudly it sounds like theres little gnomes inside building a railroad second i dont like nato straps so i put the watch on a two piece strap but the lugs curve so far down past the bottom of the watch that they dig into my skin which really hurts after a while its not an issue if you leave it on the nato but i find them to be uncomfortable third the color way that i picked isnt great mainly because i cant see the green seconds hand even in good light it just blends in with the dark grey dial so anyways those are my main gripes i do own a few timex from their reissued line like the milano xl and i really like them but this one is a hard pass for me

its a timex lower your expectation still good value for the money this watch is a little large for me and i have a 725 wrist quality is ok but remember its a timex not a rolex strap is cheap but does the job keeping the watch on the wrist its definitely easily readlegible only real complaint is the size but thats a subjective issue not an objective one love the indiglo feature great value for the money but simply plan on buying a replacement rather than exchanging the battery unless you have the tools like i have to do the job yourself

broke in less than a year like my other timez when you look up timex watches you will see a few reviews stating their low quality and how they malfunction in various waysgods honest truth this is the second timex i bought via amazon and it broke as well this time the wheel used to adjust the time or date sheared off the first timex was solar powered and the battery would not keep its chargeeven after leaving it under a lamp for hoursthey are loud they are made in the philippines or china and they breaka lot get something else or be prepared for the eventual breakdown the tough thing is finding a minimalist watch with hands that is durable and does not have all the useless junk chronometers fake diver spinning wheel etc

inexpensive but stylish expedition watch but poor shipping my timex expedition watch arrived today love the look of the watch and it runs well but found the green nylon band hard to properly size and adjust with no instructions included as well amazons shipping of this watch left a lot to be desired it was shipped in a minimally padded small mailer with a tube of toothpaste it should have been shipped in a protective stiff small cardboard box for protection the timex box itself the one the watch came in was crushed and torn when i opened the mailer and one of the little pins needed to secure and size the watch band was found loose in the bottom of the mailer that i was about to throw away if this had been a gift i would have returned it for a full refund or a replacement in which the watch was properly and safely shipped

not heavy duty the shot carrier bags will hold a 25pound bag of shot very snugly i have to fold over the top of the shot bag that empty portion of the bag after the shot settles and stuff it inside the caldwell bag in order for it to fit be careful with the zipperstheyre rather wimpy and started to separate as i zipped the shot bag in place i wouldnt want to lift these by the bottom strap that puts all 25 pounds of weight against the zipper these will serve the purpose of adding an extra layer of protection to shot bags however i caution you to show an extra measure of care with them they wont stand up to a lot of roughhousingfor their quality theyre way overpriced

just slides around everything has black sludge i bought this tumbler to use for my jewelry business and since it is small to use in rv workshop but i needed a smaller tumbler at home so i started using this one and as many people have stated the stainless steel media and jewelry items dont tumble they just slide around the sides it most definitely needs an agitator each time i use it i use clean media clean jewelry pieces and a burnishing liquid but my silver jewelry is coming out with a black oily sludge on the items i released everything even the tumbler tub but again i got black sludge after 1 hour i have 2 large arsenal tumblers and they are amazing tumblers but this one is crap i have contacted frankford arsenal multiple times but all i get is an automated email there is no support from the company after buying their product i will never order from them

this unit is not as strong as the larger model stay away product is not worth your time or money this product has a weaker motor then the larger unit by frankford arsenal it doesnt spin fast enough to polish brass correctly with stainless steel pans brass got weird hot spots on it where it lays in the bottom of the tumblr as its running and slides against the pens and the plastic interior causing wear marks on the brass the brass container that rotates on the machine does not have the rubber lining that the larger unit from frankford arsenal does which causes it to not tumble just sit in the bottom of the container and slide which causes the wear on the brass i put a hundred pieces of 223 remington in it tumbled it for an hour and it came out tiger striped with hot spots all over the brass totally ruining it highly recommend that you go with the larger unit and not this smaller weaker unit

bigger is better so i have the larger one of these tumblers and tumble alot of brass i purchased this smaller one to handle smaller batches of brass that would not tumble well along with other calibers i have not tumbled large batches in yhis yet and may have better results but on smaller runs 100 pieces they get caught in the drive ring that runs on the wheels and do not tumble just slide this unit rotates slower than the large one as well but im sure the sliding and not tumbling is more of a factor in the results im getting between the two units ill try adding a hard rubber ball maybe and see if that will knock em out of the groove so they tumblethe brass comes out good enough for reloading but the bigger unit makes the brass as shiny or shiner than factory loaded brass

nice for small batches with modification im new to reloading and the idea to clean brass cases with a wet media was appealing got this smaller version as i dont have large batches less than 300 cases of 223 or 500 cases of pistol brass first few batches didnt tumble well and media pins would collect in the grooves that ride on the wheels and the cases would slide on the smooth tumbler surface several others have commented on this and suggested a mod to agitate the cases for better tumbling with the pins a simple h bracket that fits in the hex grooves of the tumbler body forces the brass and pins to tumble during rotation used a cheap plastic cutting board from the big w and a scroll saw to cut the pattern than filed and sanded to fit tightly first batch using the mod cleaned better in less time

use with walnut gets hot under extended run fill it 13 walnut material and 13 brass dont bother trying to count the brass its the volume that matters you need 13 empty to make the tumbling work its job dont get greedythe motors get hot under extended run it may burn out in hot climates and extended useput on a timer to the power feed so you dont end up running it for hours and burn it out 20 mins is plenty enough to make the brass cleanfor best results use ultrasonic cleaner in conjunction with this tumbler use ultrasonic cleaner first to get the dirt out so walnut material lasts longer after first ultrasonic to make the resize easy and not make die dirty pop out the primer and resize the brass then clean again in ultrasonic before walnut to finish up the job dont forget to spray lube on brass before resize

works for a beeman p17 good product it works for a beeman p17 airgun at around 10 yards distance the beeman p17 is able to flip the targets up completely and then release them with a shot to the top target when i hit a target i estimate it completely flips up at least 75 of the time the targets are pretty small though but definitely hittable at 10 yards my daughter also shoots this target with her daisy red ryder although it registers a satisfying ting it doesnt have enough oomph to completely flip the targets upone tip make sure to set it up correctly with the folding legs facing you the stand should lean towards you not away from you the targets rotate round 270 degrees before being caught by the top bar it works for me when set up this way

best spinners ive every owned the media could not be loaded best 20 bucks ive ever spent this thing is no cheap thin metal spinner itll hold up to my most powerful 22cal air rifle thats producing somewhere along 25 fpe using simple cphp 143gr will buy again if ever needed dont have issues with the targets sticking as long as you clean the spot off first with alcohol i added some red and tacky lucas wheel hub assembly grease onto the spinners to keep everything nice and smooth as well to help with any rust formation from friction 100 love this item

works for me after a little tweaking like others here and friends who also bought one of these mine didnt work straight out of the box the small primer hole in the tray had a little vertical lip of plastic a few hundredths of an inch high that kept the primers from dropping down the hole and i had to remove it removal took about 30 seconds of very light scraping with a pocket knife now it works like a charmthis device deserves 5 stars for sheer usefulness but you shouldnt have to modify purchases to make them actually work as promised so 3 stars

i wouldnt say it is completely useless 100 of the time i wouldnt say it is completely useless 100 of the time it works 50 of the time primers small pistol keep jamming up in the feed channel requiring removal of the primer tube and tray to unclog i tried all the online tips of sandpaper and xacto knife smoothing the channel with 1000 grit sandpaper seemed to help a little but then again its brand now and shouldnt require manipulation to get it to work

a little shaving here and some shaving there and to date it works almost perfect sometimes a primer will get cocked at the i had read where some tinkering would be required no joke there however dremel saved the day a little shaving here and some shaving there and to date it works almost perfect sometimes a primer will get cocked at the primer hole but it is resolved easy with a toothpickthe major grief is the primer pan not turning the primers up the pan is so smooth there is nothing to catch the primer and turn it over sorry qctrying to load 100 primers i have to manually turn 25 top 30 primers maybe franklin arsenal will send me a replacement pan lol

tips for use so far i have only used for small primers this product requires very tight tolerances to work well and unfortunately not all primers are exactly the same height which can cause solvable problems two tips1 point downward at 2040 degrees when filling the tube2 if your primers are getting stuck in the fill hole or just before put a little downward pressure on the primer platter corner opposite of the fill hole this action gives a little more clearance at the fill hole ive used with cci and remington primers the remingtons seem to be slightly taller and require a bit more downward pressure

really easy way to load primer tubes i downgraded the sturdiness a bit since this is my second one of these i purchased my original one many years ago and have loaded thousands of primers into the tubes with it but it finally wore out the small primer feed hole finally eroded to the point that small primers jammed so i bought a new vibra prime and it works perfectly primers slide right into the tube with no misfeeds i was convinced that this was an excellent product years ago and when the time came to replace the old one i did not hesitate to purchase the replacement i hope in 10 years or so when i wear this one out they are still making them so i could get yet another one

afert 2 12 years still going strong the vibra prime prime makes reloading and life so much easier it does take a little finesse to dial in primer loading with speed with a little practice and the right angle the primers pour into the tubes both arsenal and dillon like water the vibra prime does like federal and cci primers the most winchester spp were the most troublesome slightly bigger diameter but still faster that manual tube loading after two and half years and 30000ish rounds im about to do my 3rd battery change you will feel it start to get sluggish i do wish frankford arsenal would make the clear plastic primer plates available to buy separately staging them for marathon reloading sessions would be nice

great product but a little sensitive to the angle you hold it at this saves a lot of time compared to individually loading each primer into the tube we you do 2k rounds in each session you either need an automated primer loader 15k for a fully loaded mark 7 revolution or one of thesesince i have only been shooting a few year i tried this first it is a great product you have to be very careful the angle you hold it at too little angle and it wont feed too much angle and the primers may get stuck in the outlet or even worse flip over as they exitfor the price it is really worth it you will just need some practice and pay a lot of attention to the orientation of each primer as it is dispensed

learning curve when i first purchased this primer filler there were lots of jams and upsidedown primers after some experience there is a proper technique for using this device first your battery must have a decent charge to run the motor at the proper speed next when holding the primer tray it has to be nearly 7080 degrees from the horizontal almost sideways to prevent the primers from getting stuck then rotate the tray so that the primers can fall in the primer tube single file once i figured out the proper way to hold this thing it made filling primer tubes much much faster this thing can fill 100 primers in under 30 seconds

would not recommend it scks when it arrived it was crooked the handle was straight but when they welded the top it was slightly canted i figured no big deal ill just hold it a little different and itll do the job but the brass and nylon heads come loose after 23 hits i wound up using blue painters tape to hold them on so they wouldnt come loose piece of crap in my honest opinion it sucked so bad i didnt want to even bother asking for a replacement because shipping would have been as much as the hammer itself dont buy this
does its job does exactly what its supposed to do

perfect performed exactly like my gunsmith said it would

cuts like a knife go easy here brothers go easythis is some super powerful stuff dont mess up your rig by getting all hasty and using a drill or any other kind of machinery and suchdo it the smart man way hand power and the proper facing tooland dont you go slathering this stuff around like vanilla cream icing on a chocolate layer cakea little dabll do ya just finefinal word of advice dont forget to wash it all down with soap and water and reoil your work piece when youre done

itll do though slightly disappointed the weight and size is good i havent had any problems to date with the heads coming loose but if they do i have loctite standing by i give this hammer three stars because of the brass head the brass head of the hammer i received had a sharp edge and a burr sharp enough to cut a finger a brass hammer is used so you dont risk damaging your project a sharp outer edge kind of defeats the purpose i removed the head chucked it up in the lathe and sanded the edge round and removed the nasty burr the package that the hammer was shipped was previously opened and reclosed with cellophane tape it looks like someone had slightly used the nylon head side of this hammer before returning it ill keep it as i am sure i will put some tap marks on the nylon head soon

save your money please i had a similiar product from a different company that broke it was much cheaper but i decided after it broke i would go ahead and splurge for the caldwell one since the cheap one worked so well the name brand one would work even better now mind you i am at the shooting range 4 to 8 times a month year round i shoot competitively and i shoot a lot so getting all my brass back is important and i take what people leave and reload for myself i took this to the range a handful of times and ended up just throwing it away it doesnt pick up brass worth squat and ends up dumping it all over the ground or it sprays out the cheap one might have picked up 22lr but it at least kept all the brass in it dont waste your time on this just go get one of the cheap nut picker uppers
three stars seems to be decently built havent had a chance to use it yet

quite good bought for gunsmithing work i am trying to restore some old rifles and need a good brass nylon hammer for delicate areasthe hammer itself is made with durable materials only con for the hammer is the brass end does not stay screwed into the socket it always manages to work itself loose that is why i gave it 4 stars also the chrome around the edges where the hammer head meets the end pieces seem poor there are areas of the chrome that protrude and will eventually chip and flake offoverall the hammer works well and is the perfect weight for any gunsmithing workbe careful with the brass side as it will dent and mar quite easily when you are using it against a punchwell worth the money and is a great addition to the toolbox

excellent box absolutely horrible packaging by shipper was shipped in original box with just an address sticker slapped on the outside no tape and not secured or properly sealed my thirty some dollar empty box arrived yesterday i am sure this is a really nice unit but without being able to use it you probably shouldnt take my word on it box was nice a bit flimsy but definitely colorful when i contacted amazon for replacement they told me to ship the defective unit back i said if only so i guess i have to ship the empty box back or i will get double charged seems a bit silly regards to all

id been thinking of getting one for a long time but now that i have it im sure its not faster than me just bending over or squatting down and picking brass up i tried it on our range with lots of brass on the gound if the brass isnt pointed the right direction it wont grab them but if it does grab one from the end and not the side it wont go into the cage and will be stuck opening the cage for the others to go out getting them out of the cage is slow as well i probably wont use it much since i shoot 1 caliber in competition and this is not picky what it grabs so it takes extra sorting

poorly made received brass retriever and the handle will not lock on the bottom section attempted to use item and unless on flat hard surface requires pressure on handle to make pick brass up which makes handle collapse within its self so required getting old broom handle that was sturdy to use purchased due to back problem and cannot stay stooped over for very long if used on flat hard surface works as described but can sweep brass up and put in dust pan if on flat hard surface have not tried on small gravel grass grown area at range do not recommend

garbage this thing will drop just as much brass as you pick up i was using this to pick up 223556 about the time i got a few in there it would drop 2 of them the tines are not evenly spaced you can fix it but it will not last long the friction lock adjustable handle is complete garbage no matter how hard you tighten it it will come loose in just a few min save your money and buy something else unfortunately i cant recommend what you should buy as i dont know just dont waste your money on this oh i used it on concrete hard sand soft sand and short grass it sucks on all surfaces

good hanmer great hammer highly recommend seller 5 stars

great for collecting brass as long as youre on a hard surface i frequently go shooting out in the wilderness and i bought this brass retriever in an attempt to make it easier to collect all my shell casings after a day of blastingi would not recommend this product for outdoor use as depending on the terrain it will either not pick up any casings or it will pick up casings and also rocks pinecones and other pieces of nature it works a lot better on hard surfaces such as concrete but i dont think it works well enough to justify using over a broom and dustpan

save your money when i first started to use this trimmer i thought it was great it wasnt too hard to set up and the repeatable accuracy was very good so i thought i had made a useful purchase i started trimming some 22250 the first 60 or so looked great nice smooth cut then the cutter started getting dull by the time i was to 80 the cutter was shot it should have come with a carbide cutter its a shame frankford arsenal has such a good design and are too cheap to supply it with a decent cutter i prairie dog hunt and sometimes i have to trim hundreds of cases thats why i bought this type of trimmer i may try the lyman brass smith case trimmer

not as good as i hoped i wanted to like it i tried really really hard to like it but i dont it is difficult to adjust and didnt hold its position you have to use the exact hand pressure on every case the slightest amount of overpressure and you will blow the case undersized by 005 you have to pinch the case between your fingers to insert it into the trimmer its not a big problem if you are only doing a few trimming100 cases or more becomes quite difficult the hand cramps multiply exponentially if you are doing short cases like 300blk i threw it in the bad purchase bin and bought the dillon rt1500

could be better i bought one of these as a multicaliber alternative to a wft it is fairly easy to set up and easy to adjust on the fly if needed so far i have trimmed 6mm arc and 308 with it i like it but it does have issuesbiggest issue for me is even with the body collet adjusted snug and being careful it will often cut case mouths at an angle the cutter is also rough and will not cut smoothlyto solve this i installed an rcbs rotary cutter and related pilot this should improve the trim and hold the case mouth square to the cutter ill be trying it later today and will update my review if needed
meh hard to make trims that are square and consistent from one case to the next

handle doesnt lock i ended up using and broom handle doesnt lock i ended up using and broom handle and not the fancy three piece collapsible handle which seems to be a chunk of the price since the roller is not up to par with the leaders of this type of product i did get the job done while squeaking away while rolling as the plastic housing rubbed on the metal wire handle mount but let me say the lower roller did work not the handle if i had seen it in action first in real life compared to the pecan rollers i would have just bought the pecan rollers it did do its job after i supplied a working handle

good starter option quick and easy to use happy with this brass trimmer so far it might not be the most accurate and consistent one in existence but it works and for where it is priced id call it a good one to get someone started ive trimmed a few hundred cases so far and they all have been within the tolerance range i was looking for seems to work well in my budget drill press eventually i suspect ill need to replace the cutting bit but by the time i get there ill probably be to the point where im ready to upgrade to something else definitely a good idea to have safety glasses and gloves when using it as you do get brass shavings all over your hands and getting that in your eyes would not be good

works good but with some limitations this will save your back the only draw back is you cant over load it with brass after couple dozen pieces or less it will start dropping brass while youre attempting to collect others thats the limitation one of them there is a sort learning curve 15 min in which youll learn how much brass is too much and how you need to orientate the wires to pick up the brass it doesnt do as well on gravel or high grass as it does on a smooth firm surface even with its limitations its a keeper just empty every dozen or so pieces and it works very well it comes with a wire form that attaches to a bucket for easy emptying i normally just use my fingers to spread wires and give a shake to allow the contents to fall out again not perfect but when used within its design capabilities it does pretty well i would buy again

works definitely a learning curve getting it set up rather than run the cutter until it touches brass i stop short of the brass and make small adjustments until i get the length i wantits a little frustrating at first picking out the right colletsbodys and getting the trim length set but you develop a system and quickly get the hang of it and after that its pretty easy to set up for your different cartridgesas far as its performance goes it quickly and easily trims to uniform lengths within 1 001 i like it and will keep using it ive only done a few hundred pieces so lifespan is still in question but it seems to be a quality built tool gavin ultimate reloader has a video of it

needs a cutter with pilots i like that it does all shouldered cases up to 458 it some times leaves the case mouth at a slight angle you have to work the case twisting 180deg so this doesnt happen however after watching a youtube video it was pointed out that the rcbs trim mate cutter fits in the fa precision trimmer i purchased and installed the rcbs cutter with 30 cal pilot and it works great it is a lot faster than the manual hand crank trimmer overall im satisfied but if you want precision trimmed brass then get the rcbs cutter and pilot of your choice and you will be happy

very nice brass picker upper this works very well on hard surface like concrete and dirt dont expect to pick up brass in grass though unless it is very short saves a lot of bending down i have a similar device for picking up pecans just different size for the metal basket if you like bending over or have a grandchild to pick up your brass dont buy if you are more senior like me this is great i havent had any problem with the handle as some others have reported the only complaint i had was that it was shipped without any tape on the box still arrived safely though
good product good product for accuracy you do need to sort your brass

i didnt know this existed i havent tried this because there is 3 of snow on the ground currently but it looks like it will keep me from being on my hands and knees looking though the grass to find my brass it came in the original packaging and it was all tore up from the post office delivering it but thats not the sellers fault i was just happy it was all there very sturdy construction hopefully it works as well as i think it will update i tried this product out when i went shooting in july and had mixed results it works pretty good to pick up bigger casings like 9mm and up but not so well with 22s in the grass hard surfaces are no problem but its the grass that has the issue otherwise i think its a decent product and will keep using it

ok in some ways great in others picked this up in rush to try to get some 308 trimmed take ur time setting it up and maybe start with a piece of brass u dont plan to load for the first time it does produce pretty repeatable results once dialed in there is some chatter around the brass mouth but a deburring tool clears this up and it may have just been my range brass it trims very quickly which i like i use for 308 but can see using it for bulk 223 as it cuts fast prob wont use this for precision 65cm loads i did have some runout but found a good placement and depth in my chuck and now its gone i havent had any real issues with it and i think its worth having in ur kit the quality single caliber units add up
its a pickup game very helpful in picking up spent brass cartridge cases at the shooting range

fast accurate easy if you know what your doing this tool is amazing i bought it for 300blk ammo i like to leave a little extra neck on the case when i run it through the chop saw this tool allows me to accurately take that extra off quicklylike in seconds the trim length is set by your case headspaceso if your length of trim varies its because your case headspace which you have set with the fl die is what is varying the trim lengthnot the tool so make sure you get a accurate case headspace set and this tool is beyond wonderful i wouldnt suggest it for precision long range reloading but if you want to crank out some ar rounds it is more than accurate enough

just right for the job good manners require that you clean up your brass at the range or more informal shooting locations we are blessed with the use of a large ranch owned by a very generous pair of brothers who let responsible shooters use the place for free the result is a lot of brass from 22lr to 308 and sometimes beyond cleaning up used to be more of a chore before i got this thing it does a terrific job of collecting the brass from a standing posture quickly and efficiently it helps to have the cases on a smooth surface like concrete or dirt without a lot of vegetation but we used it on open desert yesterday and it collected nearly every case with a single pass its now a permanent piece of gear in the stuff we take when target or ground squirrel shooting

good trimmer fast and accurate for bottle necked cartridges this works great its not for pistol ammo and even the 300 blackout struggles due to its tiny shoulder but for my 556223 ammo and my 3006 it works great after getting used to how it works i can trim brass all within 003 of each other my technique is to run the case into the trimmer with my old craftsman drill at full throttle it doesnt run as fast as a newer drill and when i feel the trimmer is no longer trimmingyes you can feel it i give the case a twist and then pull it out with a little practice you can get pretty consistent results i just wish it worked a little better for my 300 blackout

it works there were a lot of negative reviews that made me cautious but the good reviews far outweighed the bad my determining factor was amazons return policy so you take no chance of being taken i am 68 years old and shoot every week on my knees in the south texas sun picking up brass was a chore i did not enjoy at allthis is an amazing asset to range day now not only do i pick up my brass i go over the entire range a pick up what others leave i love the caldwell brass retriever

fast and accurate ive been using a lee zip trim to trim brass for over 15 years it finally broke and even though i ordered another one i thought id give this a shot for rifle brass it does take a little time to get it set up just right to trim the brass to the exact length you want once set it trims very accurately and consistently ive trimmed hundreds of rounds of 223 at a time and with the same amount of pressure the cases all came out within 001 of each other there is only a slight learning curve but this product makes short work of piles of brass mine is still sharp after several thousand trimmed cases i would recommend this for anyone wanting to simplify the case prep process

not big enough the bags are made ok but if filled with sand can only get about 5 pounds in before they fill out to a size where they wont fit in the tray of the lead sled or at least my sled with the twin rails if you can fill with lead you can get 18 to 20 pounds reclaimed lead pellets and still stay flat enough to fit good idea but the dimensions just dont work if filled with anything other than lead or maybe gold ha would not buy again i would just use sand bags available at most club ranges or try to use some free weights

a zipper closure really i was disappointed in this product since it seems that most shooting bags such as bulls bag and fat bag use a velcro closure system that tucks into the bag itself after closing so that no lead shot sand or rice will leak from the bag i bought two of these caldwell bags to hold down my portable targets on the range after studying for a while i finally decided to fill a plastic freezer bag with the lead shot and then slip this into the caldwell bag voila this stopped the problem of the lead shot leaking out of the bag however a redesign with a velcro closure would have been nice the two handles do help when setting the bag in place and the bag itself seems plenty sturdy

not heavy duty the shot carrier bags will hold a 25pound bag of shot very snugly i have to fold over the top of the shot bag that empty portion of the bag after the shot settles and stuff it inside the caldwell bag in order for it to fit be careful with the zipperstheyre rather wimpy and started to separate as i zipped the shot bag in place i wouldnt want to lift these by the bottom strap that puts all 25 pounds of weight against the zipper these will serve the purpose of adding an extra layer of protection to shot bags however i caution you to show an extra measure of care with them they wont stand up to a lot of roughhousingfor their quality theyre way overpriced

work as advertised the bags look nice and are made very sturdy they fit under the sled as well as you fill them the zippers do not close tight enough for keeping lead shot it if not in another bag inside the bag that is what i did i had watched some youtube videos prior to purchase that showed this small problem so i have partially loaded 25pound shot bags in my bags making sure that i have the ends well closed on the shot bags i am pretty satisfied with what i have they are not cheap but they are not overpriced either i just want to let people know that its better to have something inside the bag securing whatever you put in it or it will leak out

great value and with a liner work great great value and the material is thick and strong weak points are the strap which i do not see holding up to 25 pounds for long and are not very wide so will dig into your hands if carried very far and zippers are pretty light duty but then they only have to be used once to fill the bagbased on other reviews i put a 1 gallon zip lock box bottom bag inside before pouring in 25 pounds of lead shot the bags were a good size for this volume of lead once the zip lock bag is closed and the zipper on the bag is closed leakage of shot is not very likely i tried leaving the shot in the bag in came in but the shape of the shot bag did not fit well in the caldwell bag but i feel good about this arrangement

shot carrier bags work oknot great these are ok carrier bags i purchased two 25lb regraphited lead shot bags they each barely fit into the carrier bag but with some manipulation they will fit problem is they dont fit under the two bars of the caldwell dft the workaround is to place the bags on the trays parallel to the dft bars the trays stick out enough to accommodate this configuration just fine ive shot using my 300 aac ar and ruger amer 308 rifles just fine 50 lbs of lead shot combined with an already heavy 25 lb rifle rest is plenty of recoil absorbing weight cant speak for higher caliber rifles

must have with a lead sled i got two of these to use with the lead sled by the same company if you are considering the lead sled then i suggest you get these bags they dont quite hold the 25lbs but come close i suppose if it is a different size lead shot it may hold it but with the size i used size 7 or 8it only got to around 22lbs it takes the shock quite well better than 25lb plates and easier to transport imho i suppose they wont wear as well as plates but they are heavy duty enough to last a few years
well made hey theyre bags they hold all the lead needed

works fantastic does exactly as it should easy set up and easily adjustable

nice selection of bit and nicely machined there is a very complete selection of bits and a handy driverthe only issue i had was with the packagingthe individual carriers for each 5 of the large selection of bits are a bit difficult to use because the 5 bit packs are loose and you cant pull a bit out unless you remove the 5 bit packthen the other packs tend to move around and can easily be dropped out of the case if you dont have the case lying flati wouldnt recommend this unless it will be used in a shop with a flat surface not something to take into the field
four stars great tool kit for opening and playing around with my computers and home electric gadgets

this little set is a bargain it has saved my day several times if you work with various home electric and electronic gadgets youre going to find a bunch of small screws of various types this set has had the right bit for every small job ive come across since i bought it the bits are quality they fit properly and will not strip out a fastener unless i screw up the case is functional the bit holders are well labeled and the whole setup is reasonably sturdythe price cant be beat for what you get this is a bargainthe only limitation on this set is that the little handles could use some knurling they are not conducive to putting a lot of torque into a fastener certainly less than the larger bits can handle but given the focus of the set and the tiny size of the majority of the bits i dont consider this a major flaw
nice set item as described reasonable prices would do business with again
great product and value for the money love it thank you
great little set great little set keep in a mobile tool collection

cancelingtouch control earbuds i have found they pair automatically cancel pulsegunfire sounds while letting background sound through take and make calls well and they sound fine playing podcasts or day and have tried 3 different sets of various brands of bluetooth noise cancelling earphones and have been disappointed with them all until i found these the others all stay in the drawer now because touch controls on either earbud just something to consider if youre deciding between these or the pros id pick these original emax shadows all day long over the new pros for that reasonmany have complained about the earbuds losing sync with each other and then the user has a very difficult time getting them to sync with each other again as a set i can say that the number one cause of them not syncing with each other is because whatever bluetooth device they were paired to must be turned off when these earbuds lose sync with each other their device usually a phone will then recognize each earbud as a separate unit and only one earbud will give sound at a time the fix for this is1 turn off your phone so no bluetooth pairing is possible with that device these earbuds will not sync again if one or both of them is paired with a phone or similar device or if said device or any other device within range remembers either of them and is trying to pair with them turn off the device2 perform the factory reset it is a 20 second process that has a youtube video under caldwell emax shadows factory reset3 once factory reset is complete making sure your phone remains off place earbuds back in their charging case and make sure the light on the back of each is either solid green fully charged or solid red partially chargedneed charging4 remove both earbuds from case at the same time and place them in your ears they should turn on and pair to each other automatically in a few seconds usually if you put them right in your ears you will hear the paired boop sound in both earbuds you can perform a 2 second touchhold on one earbud to activate passthrough mode and listen if both earbuds then allow you to hear outside sounds make sure your phone remains off for these steps if long hold on one earbud doesnt activate passthrough mode on both earbuds they arent synced and the first steps outlined here should be performed again5 once youve determined that they are synced by doing the passthrough mode test you can turn your phone back on enable bluetooth and click on shadows under your bluetooth menu click on it and you are back in business with a paired status on your phone and a boop sound in both ears to confirm the connectionyour phone must be turned off and factory reset performed for them to sync with each other once they become unsynced or else your phone will pair with each earbud as a separate bluetooth device preventing them from ever syncing with each other that can be really frustrating so follow the steps abovei hope this helps those who have been frustrated by them not syncingthese are great bluetooth shooting earbuds especially for the price i own 3 sets so i always have a charged one or pair in my earscaldwell for the win if you have any problem with these contact caldwell and they will take care of you with excellent customer service and warranty

great earbuds questionable case i believe these will be my goto items for shooting for riding the motorcycle and for virtually any other activity in which i might normally wear bluetooth earbudsmy sole reservation is with the charging casein hand it does not seem nearly as robust as it does in photos as an outdoor product i wish it had better waterresistance features and it being 2023 as i write this review i was disappointed to see the micro usb charging portwhile i have a drawerful of cables that will fit a usbc port would give me more assurance that i have purchased a product that takes advantage of current technology

no more apple products i work construction so im surrounded by hammering and other loud noises all day i typically just turn up the old air pods but after hearing what apple is doing to censor the chinese people over continued c19 lock downs and other bs i decided to start moving away from apples products so i thought id give these a shot so far the have been a mixed bag the hearing protection has been awesome and the sound quality is comparable to gen2 air pods you can also change the volume from the ear bud which is really convenient the downside is even with all the size options these come with for the foamies theyre not super comfortable and some of the features like tap to pause and voice assistant dont work very well

does its job for the money you really cant complain about them they do what they were made for i bought these exclusively for hunting waterfowl and they work very well i can have conversations with others while hunting without having to move the old earmuffs out of the way and saying whaaaati also used them at the indoor range for the first time yesterday and was thoroughly impressed the only drawbacks are its low resistance to water as during the waterfowl season you can be in very wet conditions they also dont sound nearly as clear as my samsung buds but thats okay because thats not what i got them for strictly for hearing protection and ambient sound to hear around you these work great no complaints

good value but static with passthrough i havent had these long but so far i think its a pretty good value for money i bought these on sale on prime day for 75they block out sound decently and are comfortable however the passthough feature has a baseline level of white noise which is annoying but manageable also note that playing music while the passthrough is on reduces the music volume by about half for some reason music audio quality is ok definitely listenable i wish the battery life were longer so that it could last a whole day of hunting without needing a recharge it lasts five hours i can live with these issues for the pricei couldnt find a different set of bluetooth shooting earplugs with similar features for the money i am satisfied with my purchase considering audio quality is decent enough to have these double as everyday use wireless earbuds im no audiophile though

the camera needs to be very close to the target to adequately visualize the hits the camera system arrived with a broken clamp the clamp holds the camera to the transmitter support post the company answered my call and quickly sent a replacement the quality of the camera is lacking it works fine if the camera is fairly close to the targets you therefore need to protect your camera from being shot if the camera is low to the ground it can be protected by a metal plate the transmitter is harder to protect its roughly 6 feet off the ground and has to be line of sight to the receiver at 500 to 1000 yards its easy to shoot high or low im a bit worried that i might hit the transmitter despite these limitations i do enjoy using the system and its much easier to see your groups than using a spotting scope

they have to broken in guns are machines plain and simple they are made of steel and steel when it is first manufactures is sharp and rough there are many parts of a rifle that need to be properly broken in this is a controversial topic there are many internet ninjas who will tell you that you do not need to break in barrels and other rifle components i have dealt with machines of different types for over 20 years i will tell you that steel machinery needs to be properly broken in to get maximum performance out of them guns are not exceptioni personally break in each and every new barrel that i own this lapping kit allows me to break them in quicker and more consistently in much the same way that many top end barrel manufacturers do you can also use the lapping compound to help break in bolts and barrel extensions

wheeler bore lapping kit wow what a difference follow instructions and you will finish up with a clean smooth bore that is easier to clean after firing and you will remove some of the factory burrs and rough spots inside your barrel i recommend itassembling ammo for this chore does require you to be able to reload empty cases with the proper components after treating the projectiles with the grit paste included in the kit and unless you are a reloader or have a friend who can load the ammo for you you should look for another method to polish your bore as hand lapping is a long tedious process and is not recommended without proper lapping tools

this system works if you know what youre doing this system works it will provide the best results if you know what youre doing first use lead bulletsnot fmj you are polishing not grinding buy lead rifle bulletsor better yet pour your own soft lead second thoroughly clean your barrel between abrasive groups get your barrel absolutely clean before firing the next abrasive group third its best to fire too few rounds than too many start with groups of three evaluate you barrel between iterations this process takes time if you have no patience dont use this product if you believe that lapping your barrel will quickly make you a world class shooter go back to video games four understand that barrel precision improvement may be subtle if youre a poor rifleman you wont see the improvement

why didnt we order this a long time ago weve been taking pictures of the stuff we sell online for years we started with blank walls and thought those were pretty good then we got one of the soft popup boxes to take pictures in and the white background was even better the problem we always had was lighting and to a lesser degree reflections we tried lighting it up with studio lights that shine through the fabric like a soft box that was okay but had a weird color that had to be corrected in editing then we tried natural sunlight shining through the tent that worked best but always left one side in shadows plus it still cast a weird color to correct and there was still the issue of reflections which we fixed in editingwe found this type of led photo box a while ago and thought it looked pretty nifty with its own light inside but they were awfully expensive when we found the amazon basics model it was a better price but still a little rich so we waited for a sale before we caved and bought itwhy didnt we order this a long time ago were taking the brightest pictures yet and the reflections are historyfirst well admit that its a bit bulky its a plus that it folds for storage and transport although we wont be traveling with it but its just a tad awkward to raise it up and down the main bulk is in the top where the lights are and in the folddown plastic that makes the back wall the concept of unfolding it is easy but the execution takes a little coordination to hold the light pull it open without overstretching these elastics that are inside and pull down that wall so it has support closing it is the opposite but you have to make sure the top doesnt fall when you release that wall we decided that its easier to openclose on its side on the floor and then lift it onto the counter again none of this is hard its just strange until you get used to itonce it was on the counter the first thing we noticed was the height were using the kitchen island because its a good height for taking pictures without too much bending and its the only place we have a plug convenient you may have a better spot so this may not apply we just wanted to note that its natural height on a normal counter makes for a reach to put the camera over the top photo hole which we love by the way maybe were just too short and should get a ladder or we should put it on a shorter table yes there are solutions were simply telling you about the height to the top hole and cord storage compartment in case you can picture yourself in this situationinside the photo box its our new happy place we like the overall size of the box that accommodates most items the background is broad enough that we dont have to edit the corners out of the pictures we havent tried it yet with larger things like clothes that require a little space to spread out so there still may be some edges in the pictures anyway we really like the smooth vinyl backdrop unlike our other tent with a fuzzy backdrop that got dirty and then lost splotches of fuzz when we washed it this backdrop easily wipes clean there are a few wrinkles in the backdrop where it folds for storage but the instructions say that those can be ironed out from the backside we havent tried that yet we see that the backdrop is on a rod that looks like it could snap out but we see no reason to snap it out unless amazon starts selling other colors of interchangeable backdrops for these boxes we also like that theres plenty of velcro to hold flaps in place as needednow can we talk about the light oh heavens led light at last its so beautiful that its almost tiring to the eyes after long photo sessions but the way that the box is so white and our objects are in vivid natural color with no side shadows is worth it we have to get used to closing the front flap though weve always just stood in front of the old tent so old habits are hard to break but when we do that we notice that there is still a subtle discoloring that has to be corrected when we close the flap the light bounces off the white in all directions and results in brighter picturesdid we mention how much we like the holes to shoot through finally most of those pesky selfreflections are eliminated depending upon the object youre photographing and the angle through the hole you still may see the reflection of the camera lens peeking in but thats better than seeing you and the room behind you the magnetic strips make it a breeze to fling open any hole and have the flap catch without hanging in the wind weve used all the holes but the top might just be our favorite weve always tried to take top angles but they either come out blurry or crooked from the awkward way you have to hold the camera with this box we can just set the camera on top so its steady and it really is shooting straight down oh the wonders we should have treated ourselves to long agoif we had to find one con its that there is no onoff switch for the light you have to plug it and unplug it the power cord plugs into a small opening covered by a flap near the top left rear in and out is on and off a small inline toggle switch would have been nice and less wearing on the pin as long as that doesnt break its not a deal breaker to this otherwise fabulous new photo toy now if only our stuff would start selling faster with the beautiful new pictures

capacity and internal resistance better than expected i ordered the set of 4 c nimh amazon basics rechargeable batteries that were on sale and i was quite surprised on their quality i have ordered many brands of rechargeable batteries in the past and they have always tested less than rated advertised capacity this set of batteries measured much better than official rated capacity they were advertised as 5000mah each and when tested i got results of 5280 5375 5423 5512 mah i was shocked that one of them was over 500mah above rating wow i also noted that during the capacity test there was very little voltage sag during the discharge cycle which equates to lower internal resistance which is good i am very happy so i ordered another 4 to switch back and forth on my sangean radio

conductor is copper clad steel make sure you know what the conductor is for cables these and other popular brands use copper clad steel which is not as good a conductor as oxygen free copper chances are they will work just fine but they will be worse the longer the cable gets plus why not have the better conductor regardless of the distancecopper clad steel ccs is a composite conductor material containing a low carbon steel core surrounded by copper the copper provides the electrical conductivity and the steel contributes strength to the conductor the most common grade of ccs used for electrical conductors has a nominal 40 iacs electrical conductivity ccs is suitable for applications where high strength and medium conductivity are required copper clad steel is also suited for high frequency signal applications since high frequency currents travel mainly in the outer skin of a conductor fiskalloy
